creator: lgfbsd@be-well.ilk.org
text:
When adding control points by hand, hugin hangs.

How-To-Repeat: 
[see description]

[1004] (lowell-desk) temp> tail truss.out
open("/usr/local/share/icons/default/cursors/watch",O_RDONLY,0666) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
open("/usr/local/share/icons/default/index.theme",O_RDONLY,0666) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
open("/usr/local/share/pixmaps/default/cursors/watch",O_RDONLY,0666) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
open("/usr/local/share/pixmaps/default/index.theme",O_RDONLY,0666) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
open("/usr/local/lib/X11/icons/default/cursors/watch",O_RDONLY,0666) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
open("/usr/local/lib/X11/icons/default/index.theme",O_RDONLY,0666) ERR#2 'No such file or directory'
write(7,"^\^X\b\0-\^F \^A\^C\0 \^A\^C\0 \^A\M^V\0\M^W\0\0\0\0\0\0\0\M^?\M^?\M^?\M^?\M^?\M^?\^B\0\^D\0\M-J\0 \^A\0@\0\0-\^F \^A\^B\0\^D\0"...,1684) = 1684 (0x694)
read(7,0xbfbfd640,32)                            ERR#35 'Resource temporarily unavailable'
poll({7/POLLIN},1,-1)                            = 1 (0x1)
read(7,"\^A\^B\b\M-W\0\0\0\0\M-:\0 \^A\0\M^\t\b\0s\M^U\b\^A\0\0\0\0)\M^W\b\M^P\M^O\^[\b",32)[1004] (lowell-desk) temp>
